steps.title: Read the context after the colon
steps.content: The passage lays out three interlocking roles — maize supports the bean vines, squash shades out weeds, and beans put nitrogen back into the soil. The blank describes the "web of relations" these roles create.

steps.title: Predict the word
steps.content: A web in which multiple parts each support the others is best described as complex and densely interconnected. The blank needs a word meaning "having many interrelated parts."

steps.title: Eliminate each choice
steps.content:
• Choice A — indecipherable: means impossible to interpret, but the passage clearly lays the system out, so it is not indecipherable. ✗
  • Choice B — ornamental: means decorative, but the roles described are functional, not aesthetic. ✗
  • Choice C — obscure: means hidden or little known, which clashes with a system being explicitly described and named. ✗
  • Choice D — intricate: means having many interconnected parts, matching three plants whose roles each rely on the others. ✓
That confirms D is correct.
